rankings.why_it_matters: Quantifies the pace of the auto sector's transition, crucial for OEMs, battery makers, and policymakers.

rankings.title: Ola Electric announces readiness of indigenous 46100 LFP cell
rankings.india_relevance: Key development in India's EV battery manufacturing roadmap.
rankings.why_it_matters: Moves towards reducing import dependence for a critical component, impacting cost and security.

rankings.title: WhatsApp tests out SIM-binding norms for limited users
rankings.india_relevance: Trials a significant authentication change for India's dominant messaging platform.
rankings.why_it_matters: Could impact user onboarding, security, and compliance with telecom/KYC regulations.
